title: Decorators, Cross-Cutting Behavior, and Transparent Wrappers · Pipeline Brief: Decorator Order
summary: Add retries, timing, authorization checks, and telemetry without changing business function contracts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp decorator order increment in a transparent decorator stack with order tests. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test how stacked decorators change control flow, data, and failure handling.
Preserve signatures, metadata, return values, exceptions, and async behavior through wrappers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
